name: te-rfpb-d8
description: Forks ptv-lex-weighted's full pipeline and adds two structural recall fixes after selection: (1) root-collection entry emission — identifies the real query-root type(s) (rootTypes minus Mutation/Subscription, plus any Query/QueryRoot type present, so shopify's QueryRoot is covered) and emits every root field whose bounded return-type family (returnType + connection node type via nodes/edges->node) intersects the selected types; (2) connection traversal guarantee — for every selected *Connection/*Edge type, emits its nodes/edges fields (and edges->node). Targets the #1 STRUCTURE_FIXABLE failure (root entry-points never emitted) plus the PICK_BUDGET connection-node class.
